item_feedback.rough_input: older people / need healthcare / government pays
item_feedback.student_sentence: Older people need extensive healthcare covered with government.
issues: higher_band_upgrade: make the sentence more precise, natural, and academically connected
item_feedback.suggested_revision: An ageing population increases healthcare costs, forcing governments to spend more on public services.
item_feedback.explanation: This is recoverable, but the Coach should push it above basic B1 phrasing toward clearer academic expression.
item_feedback.how_to_improve: Add a precise academic noun and a consequence, not only a simple statement.

item_feedback.rough_input: many people retire / fewer workers / economy slows
item_feedback.suggested_revision: When many people retire, the workforce shrinks, which can slow economic growth.
item_feedback.explanation: This item was not submitted, so the Coach cannot evaluate the target skill for this part of the mission.
item_feedback.how_to_improve: Write one complete sentence for this rough idea.

item_feedback.rough_input: grandparents / help parents / care for children
item_feedback.suggested_revision: Grandparents can support working parents by helping to care for children.

item_feedback.how_to_improve: Write one complete sentence for this rough idea.
